The following events took place in '''8000 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*[[Three stormtroopers]] appear on the planet [[Bedlam/Legends|Bedlam]], after being accidentally [[Mission to Bedlam|transported]] from [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] by [[Splendid Ap]].<ref name="Tilotny">{{StoryCite|story=Tilotny Throws a Shape|book=The Empire Strikes Back Monthly 154}}</ref>
*The [[Rianitus Period]] ends and the [[Subterra Period]] begins.<ref name="Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
*The planet [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]] becomes a member of the Republic.<ref name="Atlas" />
*The Republic establishes an outpost on the eastern continent of Malastare, and the Gran species soon begin to make their own settlements and politically dominate the world.<ref name="Essential Alien">''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]''</ref>
*[[Goroth Prime/Legends|Goroth Prime]] is discovered by Corellian pirates.<ref name="Goroth">''[[Goroth: Slave of the Empire]]''</ref>
*The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Clak'dor I]] is swallowed by its expanding [[Star/Legends|star]], [[Colu/Legends|Colu]].<ref name="Geonosis">''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
